name: StartPos Finder
description: Find StartPos copies. Hold Shift while clicking the button to find a local copy.

level-info-position.name: Level info button position
level-info-position.description: Position of the cyan/orange StartPos button on the level info screen.

edit-level-position.name: My Levels return button position
edit-level-position.description: Position of the orange return button on EditLevelLayer. Auto preserves the existing placement.
